title: Thai-Style Golden Chickpea Fritters
description: A crispy and flavorful street food-inspired snack made with golden chickpeas and topped with khanom and krok.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
In a bowl, mash the chickpeas using a fork.
Add the curry paste, salt, and black pepper to the bowl and mix well.
Add the egg to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Using your hands, shape the dough into small patties.
When the oil is hot, add 2-3 patties to the pan and fry for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters hot with chopped khanom and krok on top.
Repeat the frying process with the remaining patties.
